case_title: HAMMOND, UTOPIA VS GOMEZ, RAMONE IND & DBA R.B. HAULING CO. et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HAMMOND, UTOPIA AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, RAMONE IND & DBA R.B. HAULING CO. ORTIZ, LEO IND & DBA ORTIZ ROOFING COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

TRIAL RESET TO FEB-15-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-28-2000 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
